lineage.Process: CalculateField Pipelines LEVEL_ACCURACY "1, based on GPS Geodetic Coordinates" VB #
CalculateField Pipelines ROUTE_TYPE "Produced Fluids - Gathering" VB #
CalculateField Pipelines LINE_DESCRIPTION "18 SL PETAPAHAN TO KOTA BATAK GS" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

CalculateField Pipelines LINK_IRR ""<a href=" + """O:\UPSTREAM ASSET\O&M\FE\SMO TECHNICAL SERVICES\SONAR_DATA_REPOSITORY\Pipeline_Map\" + [BUS_SUBSYS_NAME] + "\" + [DOT_JURISDICTION] + "\" + [ROUTE_TYPE] + "\" + [ROUTE_DESCRIPTION] + """ target=> View Doc <a/>"" VB #

dataIdInfo.idPurp: To give detail information about North, South, Duri and HCT pipelines.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: This data set containing Air - Instrument, Air - Utility, Chemicals - Brine, Chemicals - Glycol, Chemical - Injections, Condensate - Casing Gas, Condensate - Natural/Raw Gas, Drain - All Fluid, Foul Fluid, Oil - Crude Process, Oil - Crude Shipping, Oil - Fuel, Produced Fluids - Gathering, Produced Fluids - Flowline, Steam, Vent/Relief - All Fluid, Waste - Brine, Waste - Gas, Waste - Slurry, Waste - Water, Water - Generator Feed, Water - Injection, Water - Kill, Water - Produced, Water - Raw, Gas - Casing Vapor, Gas - Fuel and Gas - Natural/Raw/Associated pipelines data, derived from GPS handheld that has medium accuracy.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: PT. Chevron Pacific Indonesia Contact: Ardian Shah [CQXX], Deden Kurniawan Putra [DKAJ], Siti Ruhama [UFCQ], Fahmi Yuni Andari [FAHS]

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
